name: mcp-server-atlassian
description: Integrates AI tools for Jira and Confluence tasks and automation.

rating.reason: Good overall documentation with comprehensive tool descriptions and well-structured parameter definitions. Most tools provide clear 2-4 sentence descriptions explaining functionality, context, and key details. Parameter documentation is thorough with helpful examples and constraints. Tool names are descriptive and follow consistent patterns. Minor areas for improvement include some overly verbose descriptions that could be more concise, and a few parameters that could benefit from clearer constraint specifications.
